pi_items.source: Confirmed in export_result.sh line 11 which checks this exact path. Task description also specifies this path.
Generated by setup_task.sh Python block at line 77. Live-tested: file was 10,566 bytes after OpenOffice re-saved it.
Created by setup_task.sh cat heredoc at line 13. Live-tested: file was 1,245 bytes, valid JSON with all required fields.

Computed: 3 formulas in P&L table (Total Revenue sum of 4 items, Total Expenses sum of 6 items, Net Operating Income = Revenue - Expenses) + 5 formulas in CapEx table (one column total per fiscal year FY2024-FY2028). Total = 3 + 5 = 8.

Draft has 2 proper Heading 1 elements (Sections 1 and 3) and 3 FakeBoldH1 paragraphs (Sections 2, 4, 5) that must be converted. After completion: 2 + 3 = 5 Heading 1 elements. Verified by parsing content.xml: text:outline-level="1" appears 2 times, FakeBoldH1 style-name appears 3 times in body.
Draft contains 1 table (ConsolidatedPL with 16 rows). Agent must create 1 CapEx table. Total after completion: 1 + 1 = 2. Verified by parsing content.xml: <table:table appears 1 time.

Draft ODT is ~4,985 bytes as generated by Python zipfile. After OpenOffice re-saves with added content (CapEx table, TOC, footer, formulas), the file will be significantly larger. 5000 bytes is a reasonable minimum threshold. Live-tested: draft after OO re-save was 10,566 bytes.

Independently computed from financial_data.json revenue fields: lumber_wholesale(2847000) + engineered_wood_products(1203000) + custom_milling_services(298500) + bark_and_byproducts(87200) = 4,435,700. Draft incorrectly shows $4,200,000 (off by $235,700).

Independently computed from financial_data.json operating_expenses fields: raw_materials_logs(1856000) + direct_labor(743200) + equipment_maintenance(187400) + utilities_and_energy(234800) + transportation_logistics(312600) + insurance_and_compliance(98500) = 3,432,500. Draft incorrectly shows $3,500,000 (off by -$67,500).
Independently computed: Total Revenue (4,435,700) - Total Expenses (3,432,500) = 1,003,200.
Task description explicitly requires 'Insert an auto-generated Table of Contents after the title page.' Draft content.xml confirmed to have no text:table-of-content element.
Task description requires footer with 'PNTP — CONFIDENTIAL' left-aligned and 'Page X of Y' right-aligned. Draft styles.xml confirmed to have no <style:footer element.

Task description requires 'landscape-oriented page' for CapEx table. Draft styles.xml confirmed to have only portrait orientation (print-orientation="portrait"). Agent must create a new landscape page style.

Verified against financial_data.json capital_expenditures project names: 'Sawmill Line #3 Modernization', 'Kiln Dryer Expansion', 'Wastewater Treatment Upgrade', 'Fleet Replacement Program'. Each keyword matches exactly one project.

'PNTP' and 'CONFIDENTIAL' come from the required footer text. '60%' comes from the capex_status_note in financial_data.json: 'Sawmill Line #3 Modernization project 60% complete'. This note must be added after the CapEx table per task description.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses entirely synthetic financial data for Pacific Northwest Timber Products, Inc. The agent must open the draft at /home/ga/Documents/Q3_review_draft.odt and the JSON data at /home/ga/Documents/financial_data.json, then save the completed document as /home/ga/Documents/PNTP_Q3_Review_FY2024.odt. The draft's P&L table (Section 2) has WRONG manually-typed totals: Total Revenue shows $4,200,000 but the correct sum of the four revenue line items (Lumber $2,847,000, Engineered Wood $1,203,000, Custom Milling $298,500, Bark $87,200) is $4,435,700. Total Expenses shows $3,500,000 but the correct sum of six expense line items (Raw Materials $1,856,000, Direct Labor $743,200, Equipment Maintenance $187,400, Utilities $234,800, Transportation $312,600, Insurance $98,500) is $3,432,500. Net Operating Income (Revenue minus Expenses) should be $1,003,200. These three totals must be Writer table FORMULAS, not manually typed values. The P&L table has 16 rows and 2 columns; revenue items are in rows 3-6 (cells B3-B6), expense items in rows 9-14 (cells B9-B14), Total Revenue is row 7 (B7), Total Expenses is row 15 (B15), and Net Operating Income is row 16 (B16). The CapEx table must be on a landscape-oriented page with 4 projects: Sawmill Line #3 Modernization (FY24:$1.2M, FY25:$2.4M, FY26:$800K, FY27:$0, FY28:$0), Kiln Dryer Expansion (FY24:$0, FY25:$950K, FY26:$950K, FY27:$475K, FY28:$0), Wastewater Treatment Upgrade (FY24:$340K, FY25:$680K, FY26:$0, FY27:$0, FY28:$0), Fleet Replacement Program (FY24:$425K, FY25:$380K, FY26:$395K, FY27:$410K, FY28:$430K). Column totals via formulas: FY2024=$1,965,000, FY2025=$4,410,000, FY2026=$2,145,000, FY2027=$885,000, FY2028=$430,000. After the CapEx table, the agent must include the status note from the JSON containing '60% complete'. Three section headings (Sections 2, 4, and 5) must be changed from bold body text (FakeBoldH1 automatic style) to proper Heading 1 paragraph style, bringing the total Heading 1 count to 5. An auto-generated Table of Contents must be inserted after the title page (not manually typed text). A running footer must contain 'PNTP — CONFIDENTIAL' left-aligned and 'Page X of Y' right-aligned using Writer field codes for page numbering.
